title: Slovakian Spicy Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Slovakia, featuring tender lamb and a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Brown the lamb shoulder on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the pot and cook until caramelized, about 10 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned lamb shoulder back to the pot, along with the mildly spicy sausage, tomato paste, red wine, and beef broth.
Stir in the caraway seeds and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
